svg.title: IoT Automatic Weight Dispensing System — Circuit Diagram
svg.desc: Complete wiring diagram for Arduino Nano + ESP8266 IoT weight dispensing system including HX711 load cell amplifier, MAX7219 LED matrix, L298N motor driver, RS485 module, DC motor, and load cell with color-coded wires.
svg.text: ⏚ Common GND — Arduino · ESP8266 · L298N · HX711 · RS485 × 2
RE & DE pins tied → GND = receive mode
